title: pkg/bindings: use HTTP 101 upgrade request for attach
body:
For exec and attach use an upgrade request which the server responds with HTTP 101 status. Since go 1.12 the Body can be casted to an io.Writer and then use that to write to the server.

This allows us to skip the ugly hack of overwriting the default dialContext() which was not be safe when the client is used in parallel.

Oh, there is no way to access CloseWrite() on the repsonse body since that is wrapped into some internal struct where I cannot access the underlying TCP/UDP connection so no way way to caorrectly close the stdin for the server.
